name: Car Parking Simulator - Driving and Racing

reviews.review_title: Needs more in driving not parking.
reviews.review_description: I will like more driving lessons on a intersection and free way.

I do wish the driving was more authentic, like coasting and using blinkers, and also the mirrors lag, which while being good a challenge become a bit of a problem when doing stuff like the skyscraper challenges, and also the cars on the road move super slow which make actually driving behind them really boring so half of the time i just pass by them which isnt a bad thing necessarily but i like being able to have the option to actually drive good like if you were playing something like gta and maybe add turning lanes and highways and more cities and night time driving etc. Other than the game being in a barebones state the foundation is incredible and theres so many ways you could take this game and im excited for the revamp. Story mode???

Parking is excellent.  However,  driving only has left-hand drive traffic. The description  mentioned both left and right steering, so it was easy to assume traffic will be based accordingly.  Please upgrade the traffic to include british style of traffic. Moreover, driving triggerred my motion sickness too quickly. The graphic might need some updates as well
Game freezes after I select the first level

reviews.review_title: Okay Game But needs Left-hand traffic.
reviews.review_description:
So I bought this mainly because I wanted to get used to driving in a country with left-hand traffic.  It's true that it has cars with the driver's side on the right (which is how cars are set up for left-hand traffic), but when you get out of the parking mode and drive around the city, the traffic is still on the right hand side of the road.

I have tried other  PC games with this features, but they are not as nice as this game could be in VR.  The VR gives much more of a feeling of being in a real car as you can do things like look left and right and behind you, by turning your head like you would with a real car.  Also I thought using the steering with the Quest controllers felt very realistic too.  To get the same feeling with a PC games you need to invest in a pretty expensive steering wheel controller.

It’s would be better for learning if it had seatbelts we could use and all the important things to use in a car. It’s not worth the 12 dollars because the quality is super bad in the city i could tell it was poorly made and the plot is like the same it only gets harder to park the car and sometimes makes me wanna quit. I saw the video and it looked real and good but when i tried it, it was not it.
I want a refund for this game. I got really bad motion sickness. I can’t stop vomiting and my stomach is in knots. Worst game I ever played.

Car Parking Simulator VR is awesome! I’m having a blast playing it, and have noticed improvements in my real-life parking and driving abilities. The driving experience is surprisingly authentic, and the free-roam city is so much fun. Everyone should own this game! One of the most unexpectedly useful VR experiences I've tried.
Heyy, I actually really like the game because of how it learned me to park. The problem is that I thought the game was free and I bought it on my dad’s card so how do I get refound?

reviews.review_title: Great Game for Parking & Driving Basics!
reviews.review_description:
I’ve never driven a real car before, but this game actually taught me a bit about the basics of parking and driving, it’s pretty fun too! The mechanics are easy to understand, and the parking challenges are really good for learning. The city is decent, and I like just driving around and practicing.

I also heard the devs are working on a revamp and I’m really excited! One thing I noticed is that, in real life, when a car is in Drive or Reverse, it moves slowly on its own unless you press the brake. But in the game, you fully control when the car moves. If I’m right about how it works in real life, it’d be cool to see this added to make it more realistic. It would also be great if they added turn signals and other small details. And speaking of cars, adding more cars would make the game even better!

Another thing I think would be really nice is more driving scenarios instead of just parking. It’d be cool to have intersections, T-junctions, and yield situations where you have to follow real traffic rules and get them right.

A bigger city or maybe an infinite mode with traffic would be awesome too. And if we could change the weather, like rain, snow, night driving, etc.

Overall, I love the game as it is. If you want a fun and educational parking sim, this is a great pick. Looking forward to the revamp!

I’m not even joking all you can do is do missions. Which I’m not complaining about it’s just not teaching you how to drive. It’s more of a fun game for kids around the age of 10-13. If your trying to learn off this game only do the parking.. the rest isn’t even that fun. If I could get a refund I honestly would because a 18$ game after taxes is honestly insane for the little you can do. This revamp better save it because honestly this game is trash. Looking forward to a refund.

This game is so good just to get something off your chest snd just chill but with the stage of this game is on now ￼I think I’ll be better if you add turn signals by hand or button ￼and more space to park your car and like other place like a drive-through or a parking lot by something mostly just parking ￼
It so boring all you have to do is park it sucks not that realistic
I need better graphics,The steering wheel is blurry

reviews.review_title: Good game with a big potential
reviews.review_description: I hope that is an early versions because of lack of cars and space to drive in City Driving Mode. The game mechanics are so good, but it would be very nice if you add a larger city to drive in with more traffic. Also, it would be cool if you add a weather like rain, snow etc in case of City Driving Mode. I primarily like an atmosphere of relaxing driving at night

developer_response.body: Thank you for the amazing review. We are currently planning to revamp the whole game with tons of new feature.

reviews.review_description: Very good game love playing it helps you learn how to drive better without taking risks and doing it in real life 10/10 must get
The car game was the best game I have ever played with n my vr career and my first time playing

Son loved it, we returned in one month to teach my daughter and suddenly the "wheel grab" in first lesson doesn't work!? Later we solved it, in SETTINGS there is "6 DOF" control settings instead of "joystick". No idea what 6dof is :D

developer_response.body:
Hi,

Sorry for the inconvenience. Please try reinstalling the game. If that doesn't work mail me a video at sloppystudio@gmail.com

reviews.review_description: There are a few things i think would improve the game like, blinker, more realistic interiors and maps and such.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the amazing review. We are currently planning to revamp the whole game with tons of new feature.

reviews.review_description: Its a good game, gives you a good to achieve, just need more cars to unlock and use but I suppose you dont really see the car, its well done though and good to get use to driving games
Great game for practicing parking without worrying crashing. Would that be possible to add right steering for the city drive?

developer_response.body: Thank you for the amazing review. We are currently planning to revamp the whole game with tons of new feature.

reviews.review_description:
It’s good but can you add more maps and more parking btw I love your game can you make it like a 900 to 1080 it’s
Turning 90 so can you fix that and can you make the map a  little bigger and make the cars like more realistic like Honda,infinity,bmw,Toyota please make it better 😢

developer_response.body:
Hi,

Thank you for sharing your amazing feedback. We are working on the steering part.

reviews.review_title: This is a great game overall
reviews.review_description:
This game is really fun and all but there are some things i wish were added into the game/fixed in the game

The steering wheel turn angle is not realistic enough so could you make the steering wheel turn angle like a real life car?

AI is braindead so you need to make them smarter and more aware of alot of things such as pulling out Infront of players when a player accidentally runs a yellow light, ETC

While you work on the steering, some players will probably not like the new steering wheel turn angle so can you add an option where you can adjust the turning angle?

When you are turning a corner on a street the corner is square so it doesn't feel that realistic so could you make them round instead of square corners?

Can you add a manual transmission option into the game?

Can you increase graphics quality for more realism?

Can you make the speedometer and stuff like that actually work?

Can you add horns, blinkers, hazards, wipers and other basic features of a car?

Can you add upgrades for cars and make them cost in game currency?

Can you make it where you are able to get ingame currency by earning it or buying it with real money? (if you add ingame currency)

That is all I wish to be added/fixed in the game, please add my suggestions!

reviews.review_title: The steering wheel is completely wrong
reviews.review_description: The steering wheel is just 90 degrees, it doesn't make any sense. Why would anyone leave a positive review if the game is so wrong? It doesn't simulate anything.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. I understand your concern regarding the steering wheel's turning angle. I recently implemented real turning angles, but unfortunately, I encountered issues with the smoothness and overall gameplay experience. This is something I am not able to achieve at the moment. I hope other features work fine. If you think my game deserves few more start then please to review it again.

Thanks,
Team Sloppy

reviews.review_description: To be fair when I first downloaded this game, I thought it will help and I do think it is teaching people how to start learning how to drive but I need to add more to the maps so that people can get the knack of Driving feel like they’re driving a real car
Smash
So add a highway traffic map with lots of traffic
Please make a infinite map on the highway with other cars

After I saw the trailer I bought the game because of its good price. In the game I saw that nothing from the trailer was there. No good graphics, low texture car buttons, no night mode and even my hands were blue. Don't buy the game until the dev decides to actually put a game for sale that's like the trailer but I wouldn't think that would be in the near future. I saw the game years ago and it has not changed a bit.

developer_response.body:
Hi,

The game does have Nigth Mode which is unlocked with Hatchback. We recently added Truck to our game. And to make the game run smoothly on Quest we had to reduce the texture quality a bit. I hope you understand that.

I agree the game trailer has HD graphics but the gameplay shown is the same and all the levels in Quest version as shown in the trailer except for animals.

Stay Amazing,
Team Sloppy

reviews.review_description: I love this game! I’m more confident than ever with this but the mirrors don’t work in the city and the steering would be better with 300 degrees or better. I would love to practice parallel parking on the street in the city but the city needs some updating and the mirrors don’t show traffic behind me… it doesn’t even show the buildings… in parking mode, everything is perfect

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thank you for sharing your fantastic feedback. We are glad our game helped you with your driving anxiety. 

Due to the performance issues, we kept the mirror's render distance very low in the city. That is why you are not able to see buildings in the mirror.

Stay Amazing,
Team Sloppy

reviews.review_description: This is brilliant. I’m learning how to drive and using this as a at home driving lesson (for free!). I wish there was an option to drive on a uk road, instead of the opposite side, maybe there is and I just haven’t found it yet. If there was a motorway and country lane option too, that would be so amazing. Apart from that, I love this app, the graphics are really crisp and clear. I love the fact that when you are sitting in the Evoke, you can turn round and it’s like your in a real car, there’s nothing they haven’t thought of. I definitely recommend this game to anyone wanting to learn to drive, or someone who needs some confidence going behind a wheel. Obviously this can’t replace driving lessons, but honestly it will give you a boost, I absolutely love this game !!!

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thank you for sharing your amazing feedback. We are glad to hear that you are using our game to learn to drive.

Stay Amazing,
Team Sloppy

reviews.review_title: I dont think it is worth it yet
reviews.review_description:
I don't think it is worth it to get yet

 but if they were to just make the parking lot bigger in order to add more variety it would being the game up from a 4/10 to a 8/10 where i would recommend the game i also think if they made it so that you started from an entrance even if the entrance is the size of the car just so that you don't start from another parking spot. i also think making the wheel steering radius higher would also make it from a 4/10 to a 6/10 and if both of the things are added i think it would bring it from a 4/10 to a 9/10 which would be a must buy.

Edit after reading response:
 I find it hard to believe that you cant make the map bigger because i can think of other games on the quest 2 that have big citys/ maps without any problems, and to be fair i could definitely be wrong but as an example there is the game that just came out called Resist which has a large map  and it cant be because of space needed as your gane is only 500 mb. And i just saw another review from many months ago which was also complaining about the steering wheel and you said you were working on that but it doesn't seem to be the case, i dont mean to hate or hurt your feelings but i dont feel it is right when you are lying to people so yeah i give this a 2.5/10 rating with the city mode included. Dont get it. get Vspeedway Alpha instead

developer_response.body:
Hi,

Sorry to hear that you didn't like the game. We would love to make the parking lot much bigger but due to Quest's limitation, we cant.  We have a city mode where you can do different challenges, we think that can get us to 7/10 or 8/10. 

We are also working on the steering mechanics, trying to increase the radius.

Stay Amazing,
Team Sloppy

reviews.review_description: I can't find a deer to run over. Other than that great game.

reviews.review_title: Best driving game for the Quest’s
reviews.review_description: This game is pretty cool but the parking is extremely repetitive and gets mind numbing very fast. Wish there was manual mode so you could at least do something with the cars. A handbrake could be interesting too. The main thing is why are all the cool cars driving around and we are stuck with some sad Audi’s and an ugly Range Rover. The city driving is also only fun for so long as it’s probably the size of 10 of the parking lots with from what I saw only 90 degree turns everywhere. Apart from that the driving is smooth, the steering is the best out of any other Quest game.

developer_response.body:
Hi ,
Thank you for sharing your experience. Sorry to hear that you don't like the current vehicles. Soon we will adding a new vehicle that you might like.

And we are also exploring the possibility of adding manual mode.
Thanks,
Team Sloppy

reviews.review_description: This is a great game for practicing parking and driving. Only thing I would add is windshield wipers, blinkers and maybe a few other details.

developer_response.body:
Hi ,
Thank you for sharing your experience. Soon we will be adding lot of new levels and interactions . Stay Tuned!

reviews.review_description: I don't have my drivers license yet. That's why I looked to buy a driving simulator game, and this is the closet thing I could find on the quest 2. I like practice I think I'm getting. I don't know whether this game will translate into real world skill for parking a car, but I'm positive it doesn't hurt to try. For $10 this game is worth it. Only wish it had better performance since I noticed on one the hatchback missions that I got getting framey, and also the free roam area is worthless to me. The terrible performance of the free roam is sad to see when the parking section of the game was engaging and exciting.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thank you for sharing you experience. Could you please share more info on the frame rate drop issue at sloppystudio@gmail.com.

Thanks,
Team Sloppy

reviews.review_description: This is the best game  ever but it would be better to have multiplayer but other than that its so fun

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thank you for sharing your amazing feedback. We are soon going to add a new Vehicle. Stay Tune!
